# Software

## ![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,) **Web servers**

[![](fig/tools/metabocrates.png)](http://biogenies.info/metabocrates-ws)

**MetaboCrates** - tool for BioCrates kits data processing

[![](fig/tools/imputomics.png)](http://biogenies.info/imputomics-ws)

**imputomics** - missing data imputation tool

[![](fig/tools/ampbenchmark.png)](http://li1810-97.members.linode.com/AMPBenchmark/)

**AMPBenchmark** - benchmarking of models for antimicrobial (AMP) peptide prediction

[![](fig/tools/hadex.png)](http://mslab-ibb.pl/shiny/HaDeX/)

**HaDeX** - HDX-MS data processing tool

[![](fig/tools/countfitter.png)](http://biongram.biotech.uni.wroc.pl/countfitter/)

**countfitteR** - count data processing tool

[![](fig/tools/amylogram.png)](http://biongram.biotech.uni.wroc.pl/AmyloGram)

**AmyloGram** - amyloid properties predictor

[![](fig/tools/ampgram.png)](http://biongram.biotech.uni.wroc.pl/AmpGram)

**AmpGram** - antimicrobial (AMP) peptide predictor

[![](fig/tools/plastogram.png)](http://biongram.biotech.uni.wroc.pl/PlastoGram)

**PlastoGram** - subchloroplast localisation predictor

[![](fig/tools/cancergram.png)](http://biongram.biotech.uni.wroc.pl/CancerGram)

**CancerGram** - anticancer peptide predictor

[![](fig/tools/methanogram.png)](http://www.smorfland.uni.wroc.pl/shiny/mgp/)

**MethanoGram** - methanogens culture conditions predictor

## ![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,) **Databases**

[![](fig/tools/amylograph.png)](https://amylograph.com/)

**AmyloGraph** - amyloid-amyloid interaction database

[![](fig/tools/landscape.png)](http://li1810-97.members.linode.com/AMPBenchmark/)

**Curated list of peer-reviewed peptide function predictors**

[![](fig/tools/amyloid_db.png)](https://biogenies.info/amyloid-database-list/)

**Curated list of peer-reviewed amyloid databases**

[![](fig/tools/asynpepdb.png)](https://asynpepdb.ppmclab.com/)

**Curated list of peer-reviewed amyloid databases**

## ![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,) **Tools**

[![](fig/tools/tidysq.png)](https://biogenies.info/tidysq/articles/quick-start.html)

**tidysq** - tidy R package for analysis and manipulation of biological sequences

[![](fig/tools/biogram.png)](https://biogenies.info/tidysq/articles/quick-start.html)

**biogram** - R package for extraction and analysis of n-grams from biological sequences

[![](fig/tools/seqr.png)](https://github.com/michbur/seqR)

**seqR** - R package for fast k-mer counting

[![](fig/tools/pcredux.png)](https://github.com/michbur/seqR)

**PCRedux** - R package for feature extraction from qPCR amplification curve data

## ![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,) **Code repositories**

[![](fig/tools/metabocrates.png)](https://github.com/BioGenies/MetaboCrates)

**MetaboCrates**

[![](fig/tools/amylograph.png)](https://github.com/KotulskaLab/AmyloGraph)

**AmyloGraph**

[![](fig/tools/imputomics.png)](https://github.com/BioGenies/imputomics)

**imputomics**

[![](fig/tools/hadex.png)](https://github.com/hadexversum/HaDeX)

**HaDeX**

[![](fig/tools/countfitter.png)](https://github.com/BioGenies/countfitteR)

**countfitteR**

[![](fig/tools/amylogram.png)](https://github.com/michbur/AmyloGram)

**AmyloGram**

[![](fig/tools/plastogram.png)](https://github.com/BioGenies/PlastoGram)

**PlastoGram**

[![](fig/tools/ampgram.png)](https://github.com/michbur/AmpGram)

**AmpGram**

[![](fig/tools/cancergram.png)](https://github.com/BioGenies/CancerGram)

**CancerGram**

[![](fig/tools/phymet2.png)](https://github.com/michbur/PhyMet2_supplements)

**PhyMet2** - database and toolkit for phylogenetic and metabolic analyses of methanogens

[![](fig/tools/signalhsmm.png)](https://github.com/michbur/signalHsmm)

**signalHsmm**

[![](fig/tools/ampbenchmark.png)](https://github.com/BioGenies/AMPBenchmark)

**AMPBenchmark** - benchmarking of models for antimicrobial (AMP) peptide prediction

[![](fig/tools/landscape.png)](https://github.com/BioGenies/peptide-prediction-list)

**Curated list of peer-reviewed peptide function predictors**

[![](fig/tools/dpcr.png)](https://github.com/michbur/dpcR)

**dpcR** - tool for analysis, visualisation and simulation of digital PCR experiments

[![](fig/tools/amyloid_db.png)](https://github.com/BioGenies/amyloid-database-list)

**Curated list of peer-reviewed amyloid databases**

Some logos were created by Copilots Designer AI
